home.title: Plan Prep Coach
home.tagline: Evidence-informed training program design with AI guidance. Create comprehensive periodized programs from goal setting to session planning.

empty.title: No training plans yet
empty.desc: Get started by creating your first training program

evidenceBased.title: Evidence-Informed
evidenceBased.desc: AI-powered suggestions based on current strength & conditioning research and best practices for optimal training outcomes.

periodization.title: Complete Periodization
periodization.desc: From macro-level planning to individual session design. Manage mesocycles, microcycles, and daily training with precision.

export.title: Export & Share
export.desc: Export training plans to PDF or Excel at any level of detail. Share macro overviews or detailed session plans.

coachProfile.title: Coach Profile

noProfile.title: No coach profile found
noProfile.desc: Without a profile, the AI cannot provide personalized training recommendations, method suggestions, or meaningful periodization support.

coachProfile.aiGenerated: AI-generated profile – all fields directly editable

aiDialog.title: Start new AI conversation?
aiDialog.desc: The new conversation will be merged with your existing profile. Fields mentioned in the new conversation will be updated – everything else will be kept.

identity.title: Identity
identity.name: Name
identity.photoHint: Click the circle to upload a photo.

summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: AI-generated free text – directly editable
summary.placeholder: A summary of your coaching approach…

branding.title: Report Branding
branding.subtitle: Your logo and colors appear on exported training plan PDFs.
branding.businessNameHint: Shown in the PDF footer and cover page.
branding.accentColorHint: Used as the header and highlight color in exported PDFs.
branding.logoUploadHint: Click to upload PNG, JPG, or SVG
branding.logoPositionHint: Displayed in the top-right corner of the PDF cover page.
branding.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Welcome! Let's make today count. 💪
branding.welcomeMessageHint: Shown on the athlete app loading screen alongside your logo.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.name: Name
personal.hint: Personal information will be available once login is enabled.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access your account
login.error: Sign in failed. Please try again.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Enter your details to get started
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.error: Sign up failed. Please try again.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.descPre: We sent a confirmation link to
checkEmail.descPost: . Click it to activate your account, then come back to sign in.

sessionLibrary.title: Session Library
sessionLibrary.subtitle: Reusable sessions you can add to any training day

empty.title: No sessions saved yet
empty.desc: Save a session from the wizard or athlete calendar, or build one from scratch.

splash.defaultMessage: Welcome back! Ready to train today?

suspended.title: Access suspended
suspended.desc: Your coach has temporarily suspended your access to this app. Please reach out to your coach for more information.

removed.title: Account removed
removed.desc: Your athlete account is no longer linked to a coach. Please contact your coach to receive a new invite.

messages.heading: Messages
messages.noConnectedDesc: Once an athlete connects via the athlete app, you can message them here.
messages.noMessages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
messages.notConnectedDesc: The athlete needs to log in to the athlete app before you can message them.
messages.messagingDisabledDesc: Enable it in the athlete's Settings tab so messages reach them.

notifications.heading: Activity
notifications.noActivity: No activity in the last 7 days.

training.heading: Today's Training
training.noAthletes: No connected athletes yet. Invite athletes from the Athlete Database on desktop.
